title: tithymalus formosanus
intro: Tithymalus formosanus, also known as the Formosa sandmat, is a species of succulent plant native to Taiwan. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with roots and leaves used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tithymalus formosanus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Tithymalus formosanus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be used topically to treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema.
